name: avatar
title: Avatar
description: A circular avatar that displays an image or fallback initials.

docs.overview: Avatar displays a circular profile image or fallback initials when no image is available. Use for user profiles, contacts, and identity indicators.
docs.accessibility: Avatar has role 'img'. Provide accessibilityLabel for screen readers, especially when using fallback initials.

platformNotes.macos: Renders as a circular NSImageView or styled text container.
platformNotes.web: Renders as a circular container with object-fit cover.

props.name: src
props.description: Image file path for the avatar

props.name: fallback
props.description: Fallback initials displayed when no image is provided (e.g. 'JD')

examples.name: sizes
examples.title: Avatar Sizes
examples.code:
HStack(8, [
  Avatar({ fallback: 'SM', size: 'sm' }),
  Avatar({ fallback: 'MD', size: 'md' }),
  Avatar({ fallback: 'LG', size: 'lg' }),
])

examples.name: accessibility
examples.title: Avatar with Accessibility
examples.code: Avatar({ src: '/user.png', fallback: 'AB', accessibilityLabel: 'User avatar for Alice Brown' })

agent.summary: Avatar shows a circular profile image or fallback initials for user identity.
layoutHints: Use consistent sizes within the same context
Place avatars next to names in lists for quick identification
Use lg size for profile pages, md for lists, sm for compact views
accessibilityChecklist: Always provide accessibilityLabel describing the person or entity
Fallback initials should be uppercase and limited to 2 characters
